message: 🌱 Add strimzi: [Bug] Cluster Operator does not start on Kubernetes 1.33 mission (#632)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,82 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "strimzi-11386-bug-cluster-operator-does-not-start-on-kubernetes-1-33",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "strimzi: [Bug] Cluster Operator does not start on Kubernetes 1.33",
+    "description": "[Bug] Cluster Operator does not start on Kubernetes 1.33. This issue affects 20+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify strimzi troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your strimzi deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n strimzi -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi -n strimzi --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review strimzi configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant strimzi configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n strimzi -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi\nkubectl get configmap -n strimzi -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=strimzi\n```\nCluster Operator currently fails to start on Kubernetes 1.33 because it fails to decode the Kubernetes version due to https://github.com/fabric8io/kubernetes-client/issues/7037."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Bug] Cluster Operator does not start on Kubernetes 1.33",
+        "description": "This PR updates the Fabric8 Kubernetes Client to version 7.2.0. \nOther than additional improvements and bugs, it fixes #11386 via https://github.com/fabric8io/kubernetes-client/issues/7037\n```yaml\nkubectl set env deployment/strimzi-cluster-operator STRIMZI_KUBERNETES_VERSION=\"major=1,minor=33\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade strimzi to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade strimzi:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade strimzi strimzi/strimzi --namespace strimzi\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n strimzi\nhelm list -n strimzi\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [Bug] Cluster Operator does not start on is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=strimzi -n strimzi --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n strimzi --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR updates the Fabric8 Kubernetes Client to version 7.2.0. \nOther than additional improvements and bugs, it fixes #11386 via https://github.com/fabric8io/kubernetes-client/issues/7037",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "kubectl set env deployment/strimzi-cluster-operator STRIMZI_KUBERNETES_VERSION=\"major=1,minor=33\"",
+        "extraEnvs:\n  # Required to bypass this bug.\n  # https://github.com/strimzi/strimzi-kafka-operator/issues/11386\n  - name: STRIMZI_KUBERNETES_VERSION\n    value: \"major=1,minor=34\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "strimzi",
+      "incubating",
+      "storage",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "strimzi"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Deployment"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/strimzi/strimzi-kafka-operator/issues/11386",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/strimzi/strimzi-kafka-operator",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/strimzi/strimzi-kafka-operator/pull/11392"
+    },
+    "reactions": 20,
+    "comments": 12,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with strimzi installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-11T06:24:55.122Z",
